notes: I had a minor problem with the fullscreen being confined to the top left corner and the mouse not leaving that area even in windowed mode, but that may be an issue on my end with i3wm. Appart from that, it works flawlessly!
title: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition

notes:
Though it's not Linux related issue but still wanted to share. For the game being stuck on top left corner and cannot go fullscreen correctly, you can do this (directly from SanctuaryRPG Wiki):

Open gamefolder\terminal\720p\terminal.png in paint (or similar) and resize.

For 1080p resize to 150%.
title: SanctuaryRPG: Black Edition
